{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"Implement Portuguese translations in pt.json","description":"Implement all missing and untranslated Portuguese translations in i18n/pt.json.

You will receive a report from the pt-finder agent with browser-verified findings. But start immediately with the known missing keys below - these are confirmed missing from the JSON comparison.

WORKING DIRECTORY: /Users/ggomes/dev/pnmui-git/.claude/worktrees/i18n

FILE TO EDIT: i18n/pt.json

REFERENCE FILE: i18n/en.json (English source of truth)

TRANSLATION GUIDELINES:
- Use Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR) consistently
- Match the tone/formality of existing translations in pt.json
- Technical terms like MSISDN, URL, TCAP, CDR, HTTP, JSON, XML, Unicode, PCC should stay in English
- "Host" can stay as "Host" in Portuguese (common usage)
- UI terms: Save = Salvar, Cancel = Cancelar, Delete = Excluir, Add = Adicionar, Edit = Editar
- Keep interpolation variables like {{count}} intact
- Preserve the nested JSON structure matching en.json exactly

MISSING KEYS TO ADD (74 keys that exist in en.json but not in pt.json):
All spcm.* keys listed below need Portuguese translations added to pt.json:
- spcm.planDefinition.section.planIdentity = "Identidade do Plano"
- spcm.planDefinition.section.usageAllowance = "Permissao de Uso"
- spcm.planDefinition.section.pricing = "Precificacao"
- spcm.planDefinition.section.planType = "Tipo de Plano"
- spcm.planDefinition.section.renewals = "Renovacoes"
- spcm.planDefinition.section.rollover = "Acumulo"
- spcm.planDefinition.section.expiry = "Expiracao"
- spcm.planDefinition.step.0-4 (wizard step names)
- spcm.planDefinition.saveAndFinish, savePlanFirst, requiredNote, etc.
- spcm.usageCounterDefinition.*, spcm.pccProfile.*, spcm.enum.*, spcm.filter.*, spcm.status.*, spcm.pagination.*, spcm.versionsDrawer.*, spcm.cloneDialog.*, spcm.button.*

ALSO FIX untranslated values (29 keys where PT value equals EN value):
- smsc.dashboard.statusSection = "Status" -> could stay as "Status" (common in PT)
- smsc.ss7Route.pointCode = "Point Code" -> "Codigo de Ponto"
- smsc.applicationProfiles.blackouts = "Blackouts" -> "Bloqueios"
- spcm.enum.unitMeteringType.VOLUME = "Volume" -> stays as "Volume"

Read en.json and pt.json first to understand the structure, then edit pt.json to add all missing translations.

When you receive additional findings from pt-finder, incorporate those too. When done, send a completion message to the team lead.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-06T05:29:33.211Z"}

Here is the complete list of missing Portuguese translations found by comparing the SPCM source code against `i18n/pt.json`. The pt.json already has a `spcm` section with many translations, but the following keys are MISSING or need to be ADDED.

## 1. HARDCODED ENGLISH STRINGS (no `t()` at all)

### Sidebar (`apps/spcm/src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx`)
The Sidebar has 3 hardcoded English labels with NO `t()` calls:
- Line 68: `"Main Menu"` - should use `t('spcm.menu.main', 'Main Menu')`
- Line 69: `"SPCM Dashboard"` - should use `t('spcm.header.dashboard', 'SPCM Dashboard')`
- Line 71: `"Plan Definitions"` - should use `t('spcm.menu.planDefinitions', 'Plan Definitions')`

### PlanDefinitionForm.tsx hardcoded strings
- Line 47-52: `STEP_LABELS` array is hardcoded in English: `['Basic Plan Settings', 'Advanced Plan Settings', 'Policy Profiles', 'Usage Counters', 'Usage Rules']`. These are passed to `StepIndicator` which does use `t()` with fallbacks, so the `spcm.planDefinition.step.*` keys are what matter.
- Line 884: `<MenuItem value="Data">Data</MenuItem>` - hardcoded classification values
- Line 885: `<MenuItem value="Voice">Voice</MenuItem>` - hardcoded
- Line 886: `<MenuItem value="SMS">SMS</MenuItem>` - hardcoded
- Line 1000: `<MenuItem key="Hours" value="Hours">Hours</MenuItem>` - hardcoded display unit
- Line 1001: `<MenuItem key="Minutes" value="Minutes">Minutes</MenuItem>` - hardcoded
- Line 1004: `<MenuItem key="Units" value="Units">Units</MenuItem>` - hardcoded
- Line 1895: `saving ? 'Saving...'` - hardcoded English fallback (no `t()` call)
- Line 1904: `saving ? 'Saving...'` - same issue

### ConfirmationDialog.tsx
- Line 28: `confirmLabel = 'Confirm'` - default prop is hardcoded English
- Line 29: `cancelLabel = 'Cancel'` - default prop is hardcoded English
(These are always overridden by callers who pass translated values, so this is low priority.)

## 2. MISSING KEYS IN pt.json (used via `t()` in source but NOT in pt.json)

### spcm.header keys
- `spcm.header.dashboard` = "SPCM Dashboard" (missing from pt.json)
- `spcm.header.planDefinition` = "Plan Definition" (singular, missing from pt.json)

### spcm.dashboard keys (entire section missing)
- `spcm.dashboard.title` = "SPCM Dashboard"
- `spcm.dashboard.placeholder` = "Service and Plan Configuration Management dashboard."

### spcm.planDefinition keys (many helper texts missing)
- `spcm.planDefinition.nameHelp` = "Display name for this plan"
- `spcm.planDefinition.identifierHelp` = "Unique identifier for this plan"
- `spcm.planDefinition.classificationHelp` = "Category classification for this plan"
- `spcm.planDefinition.descriptionHelp` = "Detailed description of the plan features and benefits"
- `spcm.planDefinition.summaryHelp` = "Brief summary of key plan features"
- `spcm.planDefinition.planTypeHelp` = "Type of usage measurement for this plan"
- `spcm.planDefinition.usageHelp` = "Maximum usage allowance for this plan"
- `spcm.planDefinition.unitAmountHelp` = "Numeric unit amount or UNLIMITED"
- `spcm.planDefinition.costHelp` = "Purchase cost in base currency units"
- `spcm.planDefinition.precedenceHelp` = "Determines priority when multiple plans are active"
- `spcm.planDefinition.maxDeactivationCountHelp` = "Maximum number of times this plan can be deactivated"
- `spcm.planDefinition.maxDeactivationPeriodHelp` = "Time window for counting deactivations (ISO-8601 duration)"
- `spcm.planDefinition.maxOccurrenceCountHelp` = "Maximum number of times this plan can be renewed"
- `spcm.planDefinition.maxParkingRetryCountHelp` = "Maximum number of retry attempts if renewal fails"
- `spcm.planDefinition.parkingRetryDelayHelp` = "Time to wait before retrying (ISO-8601 duration)"
- `spcm.planDefinition.renewPlanOnConsumptionHelp` = "Automatically renew the plan when usage allowance is fully consumed"
- `spcm.planDefinition.validityPeriodHelp` = "Duration the plan remains valid (ISO-8601 duration)"
- `spcm.planDefinition.expireAtHelp` = "Time of day when the plan expires (24-hour format)"
- `spcm.planDefinition.activationModeHelp` = "When the plan should be activated"
- `spcm.planDefinition.activationTimeHelp` = "Time before plan activates after first usage (format: Xday Xhour)"
- `spcm.planDefinition.deferredActivationHelp` = "Allow plan activation to be deferred to a later time"
- `spcm.planDefinition.maxAllowedInstancesHelp` = "Maximum number of active instances allowed for this plan"
- `spcm.planDefinition.maxCountHelp` = "Maximum number of plan purchases allowed"
- `spcm.planDefinition.periodTypeHelp` = "Type of time period for counting purchases"
- `spcm.planDefinition.periodHelp` = "Time period for the purchase limit (e.g., 1month, 30days)"
- `spcm.planDefinition.accumulationStartHelp` = "When the accumulation validity period starts"
- `spcm.planDefinition.expiryWarningTimesHelp` = "Time before expiration to send warning (format: Xday Xhour)"
- `spcm.planDefinition.readOnlyBanner` = "This plan is live (version {{version}}). Fields are view-only. To make changes, create a new version."
- `spcm.planDefinition.creatingVersion` = "Creating..."
- `spcm.planDefinition.createNewVersion` = "Create New Version"

### spcm.planDefinitions keys (list page, different from planDefinition)
- `spcm.planDefinitions.title` = "Plan Definitions"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.fetchError` = "Failed to fetch plan definitions."
- `spcm.planDefinitions.noPermissionUpdate` = "You don't have permission to update plan definitions."
- `spcm.planDefinitions.madeUnavailable` = "Plan made unavailable"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.madeAvailable` = "Plan made available"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.toggleFailed` = "Failed to toggle availability"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.finalised` = "Plan finalised successfully"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.finaliseFailed` = "Failed to finalise plan"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.versionsFetchError` = "Failed to load versions"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.cloneSuccess` = "Plan cloned successfully"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.cloneFailed` = "Failed to clone plan"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.newVersionCreated` = "New draft version created"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.createVersionFailed` = "Failed to create new version"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.noPermissionDelete` = "You don't have permission to delete plan definitions."
- `spcm.planDefinitions.deleteSuccess` = "Plan definition(s) deleted successfully!"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.deleteFailed` = "Failed to delete plan definition(s)."
- `spcm.planDefinitions.confirmDelete` = "Are you sure you want to delete the selected plan definition(s)?"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.noRecords` = "No plan definitions found"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.columns.name` = "Name"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.columns.state` = "Status"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.columns.version` = "Version"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.columns.lastUpdated` = "Last Updated"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.columns.actions` = "Actions"
- `spcm.planDefinitions.newVersionFailed` = "Failed to create new version"

### spcm.filter keys
- `spcm.filter.planLabel` = "Plan"

### spcm.pagination keys (source uses different keys than pt.json has)
- `spcm.pagination.first` = "First"
- `spcm.pagination.previous` = "Previous" (exists but verify key path)
- `spcm.pagination.pageInfo` = "Page {{current}} of {{total}} (Total Records: {{count}})"
- `spcm.pagination.next` = "Next"
- `spcm.pagination.last` = "Last"

### spcm.precedence keys (entirely missing section)
- `spcm.precedence.lowest` = "Lowest"
- `spcm.precedence.low` = "Low"
- `spcm.precedence.medium` = "Medium"
- `spcm.precedence.high` = "High"
- `spcm.precedence.highest` = "Highest"

### spcm.pccProfile keys (missing helper/operational keys)
- `spcm.pccProfile.viewTitle` = "PCC Profile"
- `spcm.pccProfile.refreshFailed` = "Failed to refresh PCC profiles"

### spcm.usageCounterDefinition keys (missing)
- `spcm.usageCounterDefinition.dialogTitle` = "Usage Counter"
- `spcm.usageCounterDefinition.unitMeteringTypeHelp` = "Type of units tracked by this counter"
- `spcm.usageCounterDefinition.pccProfilesHelp` = "PCC Profile(s) usage to track"
- `spcm.usageCounterDefinition.resetTimeTypeHelp` = "Whether reset occurs at a specific time or relative to an event"
- `spcm.usageCounterDefinition.resetFrequencyHelp` = "Frequency at which the counter resets"
- `spcm.usageCounterDefinition.refreshFailed` = "Failed to refresh usage counters"
- `spcm.usageCounterDefinition.info` = "Define counters that track subscriber usage based on PCC Profile(s)"

### spcm.usageRuleDefinition keys (missing)
- `spcm.usageRuleDefinition.dialogTitle` = "Usage Rule"
- `spcm.usageRuleDefinition.refreshFailed` = "Failed to refresh usage rules"

### spcm.validation keys (missing)
- `spcm.validation.identifierMaxLength` = "Identifier must be 255 characters or less"
- `spcm.validation.classificationMaxLength` = "Classification must be 255 characters or less"
- `spcm.validation.profileNameMaxLength` = "Profile names must be 255 characters or less"
- `spcm.validation.invalidDuration` = "Max deactivation period must be a valid duration (e.g. 30days, 1month)"
- `spcm.validation.pccProfileRequired` = "At least one threshold PCC profile is required"
- `spcm.validation.actionRequired` = "An action is required"

### common keys used in SPCM that need to exist in pt.json
- `common.button.backToList` = "Back to List"
- `common.button.next` = "Next"
- `common.toast.noRowsSelected` = "Please select rows to delete."
- `common.dialog.delete.title` = "Confirm Delete"

Please add all these missing translations to `i18n/pt.json`. The file path is `/Users/ggomes/dev/pnmui-git/.claude/worktrees/i18n/i18n/pt.json`.
summary: Complete list of missing Portuguese translations found in SPCM
